title: EPCIS Event Structure
description: Field documentation for GS1 EPCIS 2.0 event objects used in RFID supply chain traceability

fields.name: type
fields.description: Event type: ObjectEvent, AggregationEvent, TransactionEvent, TransformationEvent, AssociationEvent

fields.name: bizStep
fields.description: Business step URI from CBV vocabulary

fields.name: readPoint
fields.description: Specific physical read location (with id URI)

fields.name: sensorElementList
fields.description: Environmental sensor readings associated with the event
